title: echinocereus scheeri subsp. scheeri
intro: Echinocereus scheeri subsp. scheeri is a cactus species belonging to the Echinocereus genus, characterized by its small size, globular shape, and short spines. The plant is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Echinocereus scheeri subsp. scheeri include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
